Example 1¶

In [3]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [4]:
np.random.seed(42)
n_months = 200
dates = pd.date_range('2008-01-01', periods=n_months, freq='MS')
trend = np.linspace(50, 70, n_months) 
seasonal = 10 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * np.arange(n_months) / 12)  
noise = np.random.randn(n_months) * 2  
y = trend + seasonal + noise
df = pd.DataFrame({'value': y}, index=dates)
In [5]:
df.head()
Out[5]:
value
2008-01-01 50.993428
2008-02-01 54.823974
2008-03-01 60.156636
2008-04-01 63.347567
2008-05-01 58.593957

EDA¶

In [6]:
from fcstmetrics.utils import plot_eda
In [7]:
fig = plot_eda(df['value'])
plt.show()

Mean value: 60.08%
Min value: 41.20% (2010-10-01 00:00:00)
Max value: 80.37% (2024-04-01 00:00:00)
Standard deviation: 9.26%
Inferred freq: <MonthBegin>

sktime formatting¶

In [8]:
from fcstmetrics.utils import prepare_sktime_train_test
In [9]:
y_train, y_test = prepare_sktime_train_test(data=df['value'], train_size=0.8, freq='MS', start_date=df.index[0], include_plot = True)
In [10]:
y_train = y_train.asfreq('MS')
y_test = y_test.asfreq('MS')
In [11]:
print(f"Training: {len(y_train)} months")
print(f"Test: {len(y_test)} months")
print(f"Train period: {y_train.index[0]} to {y_train.index[-1]}")
print(f"Test period: {y_test.index[0]} to {y_test.index[-1]}")

Training: 160 months
Test: 40 months
Train period: 2008-01-01 00:00:00 to 2021-04-01 00:00:00
Test period: 2021-05-01 00:00:00 to 2024-08-01 00:00:00

Train models¶

In [12]:
from statsmodels.tsa.holtwinters import ExponentialSmoothing
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
In [13]:
model_es = ExponentialSmoothing(y_train, seasonal_periods=12, trend='add', seasonal='add', damped_trend=True)
fit_es = model_es.fit()
pred_es_train = fit_es.fittedvalues
pred_es_test = fit_es.forecast(len(y_test))
pred_es_test = pd.Series(pred_es_test, index=y_test.index)
In [14]:
X_train = np.column_stack([np.arange(len(y_train)),
                           np.sin(2 * np.pi * np.arange(len(y_train)) / 12),
                           np.cos(2 * np.pi * np.arange(len(y_train)) / 12)])
X_test = np.column_stack([np.arange(len(y_train), len(y_train) + len(y_test)),
                          np.sin(2 * np.pi * np.arange(len(y_train), len(y_train) + len(y_test)) / 12),
                          np.cos(2 * np.pi * np.arange(len(y_train), len(y_train) + len(y_test)) / 12)])
lr = LinearRegression()
lr.fit(X_train, y_train.values)
pred_lr_train = lr.predict(X_train)
pred_lr_test = lr.predict(X_test)
pred_lr_test = pd.Series(pred_lr_test, index=y_test.index)

Plot predictions¶

In [15]:
from fcstmetrics.utils import plot_predictions, plot_predictions_full
In [16]:
models = {'Exponential Smoothing': pred_es_test,
          'Linear Regression': pred_lr_test}
for name, predictions in models.items():
    fig = plot_predictions_full(y_train=y_train, y_test=y_test, y_pred=predictions, title=f'{name}: Predictions vs Actual')
    plt.show()
In [19]:
for name, predictions in models.items():
    fig = plot_predictions(y_test=y_test, y_pred=predictions, title=f'{name}: Predictions vs Actual')
    plt.show()

Residual analysis¶

In [20]:
from fcstmetrics.utils import plot_residuals
In [21]:
residuals_es = y_test.values - pred_es_test.values
fig = plot_residuals(residuals=residuals_es, timestamps=y_test.index, title='Exponential Smoothing Residual Analysis')
plt.show()

Model Validation¶

In [26]:
from fcstmetrics import validate_forecast, compare_models
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')
In [27]:
report_es = validate_forecast(y_train=y_train.values, y_train_pred=pred_es_train.values, y_test=y_test.values, 
                              y_test_pred=pred_es_test.values, model_name="Exponential Smoothing", print_report=True)

report_lr = validate_forecast(y_train=y_train.values, y_train_pred=pred_lr_train, y_test=y_test.values,
                              y_test_pred=pred_lr_test.values, model_name="Linear Regression", print_report=True)

In [29]:
models_comparison = {'ExpSmoothing': (y_train.values, pred_es_train.values, y_test.values, pred_es_test.values),
                     'LinearReg': (y_train.values, pred_lr_train, y_test.values, pred_lr_test.values)}
comparator = compare_models(models_comparison, print_report=True)

================================================================================

Diagnostic plots¶

In [33]:
from fcstmetrics.utils import plot_diagnostics
In [34]:
fig = plot_diagnostics(y_train=y_train.values, y_train_pred=pred_es_train.values, y_test=y_test.values, y_test_pred=pred_es_test.values)
plt.show()
